category.scope_note: Air-source heat pumps and heat pump air conditioners exported from China to South Africa.

title.en: China-to-South Africa Air-source Heat Pump Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入南非：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入南非：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China air-source heat pump documentation against South Africa's NRCS mandatory Letter of Authority (VC 8055), SANEDI mandatory energy labelling and MEPS (5-star scheme), SANS 60335-2-40 electrical safety framework, DFFE ODS refrigerant regulations, and ICASA radio/EMC homologation requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国空气源热泵文件与南非NRCS强制性授权书（VC 8055）、SANEDI强制能效标签及最低能效标准（5星级方案）、SANS 60335-2-40电气安全框架、环境林业渔业部（DFFE）臭氧耗损物质法规及ICASA无线/电磁兼容准入要求的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國空氣源熱泵文件與南非NRCS強制性授權書（VC 8055）、SANEDI強制能效標籤及最低能效標準（5星級方案）、SANS 60335-2-40電氣安全框架、環境林業漁業部（DFFE）臭氧耗損物質法規及ICASA無線／電磁相容準入要求之差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, market-access approval, NRCS Letter of Authority, SANEDI energy label determination, DFFE permit, or ICASA type-approval. Exporters, importers, customs brokers, distributors, and installers should verify current NRCS VC 8055 scope, SANEDI MEPS thresholds and star-rating obligations, SANS edition applicability, DFFE ODS permit requirements, ICASA radio homologation scope, and South African voltage and load-shedding compliance requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、市场准入批准、NRCS授权书、SANEDI能效标签认定、DFFE许可或ICASA型式认证。出口商、进口商、报关代理、经销商和安装方应在出货、销售或安装前与合格专业人士核验现行NRCS VC 8055适用范围、SANEDI最低能效标准门槛及星级义务、SANS版本适用性、DFFE臭氧耗损物质许可要求、ICASA无线准入范围以及南非电压及停电轮供合规要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、市場准入批准、NRCS授權書、SANEDI能效標籤認定、DFFE許可或ICASA型式認證。出口商、進口商、報關代理、經銷商和安裝方應在出貨、銷售或安裝前與合格專業人士核驗現行NRCS VC 8055適用範圍、SANEDI最低能效標準門檻及星級義務、SANS版本適用性、DFFE臭氧耗損物質許可要求、ICASA無線準入範圍以及南非電壓及停電輪供合規要求。

answer_first.en: For Chinese air-source heat pumps entering South Africa, the major compliance gaps are the NRCS mandatory Letter of Authority under VC 8055 (CCC not recognised), SANEDI mandatory energy label and MEPS under the 5-star scheme (Energy Efficiency Regulations), SANS 60335-2-40 electrical safety (230 V / 50 Hz grid; load-shedding voltage tolerance), DFFE ODS permit for R-22 or controlled refrigerants, and ICASA type-approval for any wireless-enabled unit.
answer_first.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入南非的主要合规差距包括：NRCS在VC 8055下强制要求的授权书（CCC不被认可）、SANEDI依能效法规5星级方案要求的强制能效标签及最低能效标准、SANS 60335-2-40电气安全标准（230V/50Hz电网；需满足停电轮供电压波动容差）、DFFE对R-22或受控制冷剂的臭氧耗损物质许可，以及配置无线功能机型的ICASA型式认证。
answer_first.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入南非的主要合規差距包括：NRCS在VC 8055下強制要求的授權書（CCC不被認可）、SANEDI依能效法規5星級方案要求的強制能效標籤及最低能效標準、SANS 60335-2-40電氣安全標準（230V/50Hz電網；需滿足停電輪供電壓波動容差）、DFFE對R-22或受控制冷劑的臭氧耗損物質許可，以及配置無線功能機型的ICASA型式認證。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly or upon NRCS, SANEDI, DFFE, and ICASA regulatory updates
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
